description.value: There is no clever answer to weight and momentum applied with complete commitment.

system.benefits: Your attacks with [Two-Handed] weapons ignore the first point of Multiple Action Penalty. Your second [Combat] action adds nothing to both dice instead of adding 1. Additionally, once per long rest when you reduce a creature to 0 HP with a [Two-Handed] weapon, every hostile creature within 30 feet that can see you must make a [[/save type=will]] opposed by your Strength + Intimidate. Failure inflicts Frightened until the start of your next turn. Creatures that succeed are immune to this effect for the remainder of the combat.
